name: Starter Philosophy
description: Template prompts for philosophical clarity and exploration.

prompts.title: Free will without slogans
prompts.prompt: Can you explain the free will debate in a way that actually helps someone think, rather than just listing positions?

prompts.title: Meaning without permanence
prompts.prompt: If nothing lasts forever, does that weaken meaning or make meaning more concentrated?

prompts.title: Selfhood
prompts.prompt: What makes me the same person over time if my body, beliefs, memories, and personality all change?

prompts.title: Beauty and truth
prompts.prompt: Is beauty a clue to truth, or just something the mind projects onto the world?

prompts.title: Practical philosophy
prompts.prompt: What is one philosophical idea that actually changes how a person lives day to day if they take it seriously?
